scope: Freeze output-sensitive Chinese safety literals without rewriting user-visible copy.

required_phrases: 本系统仅用于问诊信息整理和风险提示
不构成诊断或治疗建议
不能输出药物、处方或替代医生判断的内容
本系统输出仅用于问诊辅助整理
不能替代线下医生面诊

changed_files.change: Added UTF-8 and required-phrase checks for output-sensitive Chinese safety literals.
Added P4.6.6 encoding and Chinese literal stability report.

unchanged_contracts: FastAPI API contract and response body semantics
SQLite schema and historical session compatibility
fake/test path and real runtime path separation
RAG read-only boundary for core consultation state
known_cautions: This phase freezes selected high-value anchors; it is not a complete copy review of every Chinese literal in the repository.
Existing terminal output may still render garbled depending on PowerShell encoding settings even when source files are UTF-8.
Future literal repair needs API/report snapshots and human copy approval.
The bundled knowledge base remains a tiny smoke-test corpus, not a real medical textbook or guideline import.
risky_items_not_touched: user-visible API schema and response fields
risk rules and safety post-check behavior
RAG retrieval ranking and evidence-pack semantics
existing knowledge-base content beyond stability anchors
suspected mojibake candidates outside this focused anchor list

next_recommended_phase.name: P4.6.7 Phase 4 Freeze Report
items: Confirm contracts and risky items remain frozen.
Record final gate status and readiness for real-path validation.
